iterate.script: modulesWithLessons.add([ moduleId: module.moduleId, pseudoId: module.pseudoId, courseId: module.courseId, title: module.title, description: module.description, sequenceNum: module.sequenceNum, estimatedDuration: module.estimatedDuration, createdDate: module.createdDate, lastModifiedDate: module.lastModifiedDate, lessons: lessonList*.getMap() ])

courses.add([ courseId: courseEntity.courseId, pseudoId: courseEntity.pseudoId, ownerPartyId: courseEntity.ownerPartyId, productId: courseEntity.productId, productPseudoId: productPseudoId, title: courseEntity.title, description: courseEntity.description, objectives: courseEntity.objectives, targetPersonaId: courseEntity.targetPersonaId, difficulty: courseEntity.difficulty, estimatedDuration: courseEntity.estimatedDuration, status: courseEntity.status, coverImageUrl: courseEntity.coverImageUrl, createdDate: courseEntity.createdDate, lastModifiedDate: courseEntity.lastModifiedDate, modules: modulesWithLessons, price: coursePrice ])

if.message: Course not found or access denied

iterate.script: modulesWithLessons.add([ moduleId: module.moduleId, pseudoId: module.pseudoId, title: module.title, description: module.description, sequenceNum: module.sequenceNum, estimatedDuration: module.estimatedDuration, lessons: lessonList*.getMap() ])

set.from: [ courseId: courseEntity.courseId, pseudoId: courseEntity.pseudoId, ownerPartyId: courseEntity.ownerPartyId, productId: courseEntity.productId, productPseudoId: productPseudoId, title: courseEntity.title, description: courseEntity.description, objectives: courseEntity.objectives, targetPersonaId: courseEntity.targetPersonaId, difficulty: courseEntity.difficulty, estimatedDuration: courseEntity.estimatedDuration, status: courseEntity.status, coverImageUrl: courseEntity.coverImageUrl, createdDate: courseEntity.createdDate, lastModifiedDate: courseEntity.lastModifiedDate, modules: modulesWithLessons, price: coursePrice ]

service-call.name: growerp.100.GeneralServices100.getNext#PseudoId
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: context.ownerPartyId, seqName: 'Course']

service-call.name: growerp.100.GeneralServices100.getNext#PseudoId
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: context.ownerPartyId, seqName: 'product']

service-call.name: create#mantle.product.Product
service-call.in-map: [ pseudoId: prodSeq.seqNum, productName: title, description: description, ownerPartyId: context.ownerPartyId, productTypeEnumId: 'PtService', requireInventory: 'N', salesIntroductionDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp ]

service-call.name: create#growerp.course.Course
service-call.in-map: [ pseudoId: seqContext.seqNum, ownerPartyId: context.ownerPartyId, productId: productId, title: title, description: description, objectives: objectives, targetPersonaId: targetPersonaId, difficulty: difficulty, estimatedDuration: estimatedDuration, status: 'DRAFT', coverImageUrl: coverImageUrl, createdDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, lastModifiedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, createdByUserLogin: ec.user.username ]

if.message: Course not found or access denied

service-call.name: update#growerp.course.Course
service-call.in-map: [ courseId: courseId, productId: productId ?: courseEntity.productId, title: title ?: courseEntity.title, description: description ?: courseEntity.description, objectives: objectives ?: courseEntity.objectives, targetPersonaId: targetPersonaId ?: courseEntity.targetPersonaId, difficulty: difficulty ?: courseEntity.difficulty, estimatedDuration: estimatedDuration ?: courseEntity.estimatedDuration, status: status ?: courseEntity.status, coverImageUrl: coverImageUrl ?: courseEntity.coverImageUrl, lastModifiedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp ]

service-call.name: update#mantle.product.ProductPrice
service-call.in-map: [productPriceId: existingPrice.productPriceId, thruDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service-call.name: create#mantle.product.ProductPrice
service-call.in-map: [ productId: effectiveProductId, priceTypeEnumId: 'PptCurrent', pricePurposeEnumId: 'PppPurchase', currencyUomId: 'USD', price: price, fromDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp ]

if.message: Course not found or access denied
Course not found or access denied

service-call.name: growerp.100.GeneralServices100.getNext#PseudoId
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: context.ownerPartyId, seqName: 'CourseModule']

service-call.name: create#growerp.course.CourseModule
service-call.in-map: [ pseudoId: seqContext.seqNum, courseId: courseId, title: title, description: description, sequenceNum: sequenceNum, estimatedDuration: estimatedDuration, createdDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, lastModifiedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp ]

if.message: Module not found or access denied

service-call.name: update#growerp.course.CourseModule
service-call.in-map: [ moduleId: moduleId, title: title ?: moduleEntity.title, description: description ?: moduleEntity.description, sequenceNum: sequenceNum ?: moduleEntity.sequenceNum, estimatedDuration: estimatedDuration ?: moduleEntity.estimatedDuration, lastModifiedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp ]

if.message: Module not found or access denied
Module not found or access denied

service-call.name: growerp.100.GeneralServices100.getNext#PseudoId
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: context.ownerPartyId, seqName: 'CourseLesson']

service-call.name: create#growerp.course.CourseLesson
service-call.in-map: [ pseudoId: seqContext.seqNum, moduleId: moduleId, courseId: moduleEntity.courseId, title: title, content: content, keyPoints: keyPoints, sequenceNum: sequenceNum, estimatedDuration: estimatedDuration, videoUrl: videoUrl, imageUrl: imageUrl, createdDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, lastModifiedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp ]

if.message: Lesson not found or access denied

service-call.name: update#growerp.course.CourseLesson
service-call.in-map: [ lessonId: lessonId, title: title ?: lessonEntity.title, content: content ?: lessonEntity.content, keyPoints: keyPoints ?: lessonEntity.keyPoints, sequenceNum: sequenceNum ?: lessonEntity.sequenceNum, estimatedDuration: estimatedDuration ?: lessonEntity.estimatedDuration, videoUrl: videoUrl ?: lessonEntity.videoUrl, imageUrl: imageUrl ?: lessonEntity.imageUrl, lastModifiedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp ]

if.message: Lesson not found or access denied
Media not found or access denied

service-call.name: update#growerp.course.CourseMedia
service-call.in-map: [ mediaId: mediaId, title: title ?: mediaEntity.title, editedContent: editedContent ?: mediaEntity.editedContent, status: status ?: mediaEntity.status, scheduledDate: scheduledDate ?: mediaEntity.scheduledDate, lastModifiedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp ]

service-call.name: update#growerp.course.CourseProgress
service-call.in-map: [ progressId: progressEntity.progressId, currentLessonId: lessonId, completedLessons: completedLessonsJson, progressPercent: progressPercent, lastAccessDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, completedDate: isCompleted ? ec.user.nowTimestamp : null ]

else.script: def completedList = completed ? [lessonId] : [] context.completedLessonsJson = groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson(completedList) context.progressPercent = totalLessons > 0 ? ((completedList.size() * 100) / totalLessons) as Integer : 0

service-call.name: create#growerp.course.CourseProgress
service-call.in-map: [ userId: ec.user.userId, courseId: courseId, currentLessonId: lessonId, completedLessons: completedLessonsJson, progressPercent: progressPercent, startedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, lastAccessDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp ]

service.description: Returns courses the current user has active subscriptions for (elearner app)

iterate.script: courses.add([ courseId: courseEntity.courseId, pseudoId: courseEntity.pseudoId, ownerPartyId: courseEntity.ownerPartyId, productId: courseEntity.productId, title: courseEntity.title, description: courseEntity.description, objectives: courseEntity.objectives, difficulty: courseEntity.difficulty, estimatedDuration: courseEntity.estimatedDuration, status: courseEntity.status, coverImageUrl: courseEntity.coverImageUrl, moduleCount: moduleList.size(), lessonCount: lessonCount, progressPercent: courseProgress?.progressPercent ?: 0 ])

service.description: Returns all users' progress for a course (admin use)

if.message: Course not found or access denied

iterate.script: participants.add([ userId: prog.userId, partyId: userAccount?.partyId, firstName: person?.firstName, lastName: person?.lastName, username: userAccount?.username, progressPercent: prog.progressPercent, completedLessons: prog.completedLessons, startedDate: prog.startedDate, lastAccessDate: prog.lastAccessDate, completedDate: prog.completedDate ])

service.description: Returns participants across all courses for the company (admin use), with optional search on name, email or course title. Source is subscriptions so newly enrolled participants appear immediately even before they start a course.

iterate.script: def firstName = person?.firstName ?: '' def lastName = person?.lastName ?: '' def fullName = (firstName + ' ' + lastName).trim() def username = userAccount?.username ?: '' def courseTitle = course.title ?: '' // Apply search filter on name, email/username or course title def matchesFilter = true if (filter?.trim()) { def q = filter.trim().toLowerCase() matchesFilter = fullName.toLowerCase().contains(q) || username.toLowerCase().contains(q) || courseTitle.toLowerCase().contains(q) } if (matchesFilter) { participants.add([ courseId: course.courseId, courseTitle: courseTitle, userId: userAccount?.userId, partyId: subscription.subscriberPartyId, firstName: firstName, lastName: lastName, username: username, progressPercent: prog?.progressPercent ?: 0, completedLessons: prog?.completedLessons, startedDate: prog?.startedDate, lastAccessDate: prog?.lastAccessDate, completedDate: prog?.completedDate ]) }

service.description: Generate a video from a YouTube script using AI

return.message: Video generation is only available for YouTube scripts

service.description: Subscribe the current authenticated user to a course, processing Stripe payment if the course has a price.

return.message: Payment information required for paid courses

service-call.name: mantle.account.PaymentMethodServices.create#CreditCard
service-call.in-map: [ paymentMethodTypeEnumId: 'PmtCreditCard', ownerPartyId: subscriberPartyId, cardNumber: creditCardNumber, expireDate: expireDate, firstNameOnAccount: nameOnCard, lastNameOnAccount: '', paymentGatewayConfigId: System.getProperty('paymentGatewayConfigId') ]

service-call.name: growerp.100.GeneralServices100.getNext#PseudoId
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, seqName: 'payment']

service-call.name: create#mantle.account.payment.Payment
service-call.in-map: [ statusId: 'PmntPromised', pseudoId: paySeq.seqNum, paymentMethodId: paymentMethodId, amount: coursePrice, amountUomId: 'USD', paymentInstrumentEnumId: 'PiCreditCard', effectiveDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, paymentTypeEnumId: 'PmtCreditCard', fromPartyId: subscriberPartyId, toPartyId: companyPartyId ]

service-call.name: Stripe.StripePaymentServices.authorizeAndCapture#Payment
service-call.in-map: [paymentId: paymentInfo.paymentId, paymentGatewayConfigId: System.getProperty('paymentGatewayConfigId')]

service-call.name: create#mantle.product.subscription.Subscription
service-call.in-map: [ ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, subscriberPartyId: subscriberPartyId, productId: productId, fromDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp ]
